videos.title: These Jeep Parts Will Fail
videos.description:
Your Jeep is past 100,000 miles, now what?

Jerry and I go through the parts and systems that are most likely to fail on your Jeep Wrangler JL or Gladiator JT once you hit the 100K mark. These aren't guesses, they're the issues we see over and over again on the 3.6 Pentastar and 2.0 turbo platforms.

⚙️Shift Autowerx: https://shiftautoandoffroad.com
⛑️TrailRecon First Aid Kit: https://bit.ly/TrailReconFirstAidKit
🌎 TrailRecon Shop: https://bit.ly/trailreconstore

🛻 Facebook: https:

videos.title: Transform Copilot With CUSTOM UI Widgets From Power Apps
videos.description:
What you’re looking at here in #Copilot is an interactive widget that I built with #PowerApps.

That’s right, Copilot is no longer limited to text based responses. You can build your own custom widgets and put them right there in the chat window. My mind is absolutely blown.

This is all possible thanks to a brand new concept in Copilot called #MCPApps. MCP Apps provide the data and actions, and widgets provide the visual interface.

In this video we are going to build the whole calendar compone

videos.title: Copilot's New Edit Mode Does the Work For You in Word, Excel & PowerPoint
videos.description:
Copilot in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint has a new mode that goes way beyond answering questions and summarising documents. In this video I show you exactly how I'm using it to do real work — filling forms from unstructured emails, editing complex documents in natural language, building analysis in Excel, reformatting PowerPoint slides, and more.
If you've had Copilot and not been getting much out of it in these apps, this is the video to watch. And stick around to the end for the one hack that wi

videos.title: Discover Your Human Superpowers
videos.description:
What makes you a full stack human?

In the age of AI, we need to discover our unique superpowers.

Dona Sarkar breaks down the three essential components:

1. Heart Superpower
2. Cognition Superpower
3. Presence Superpower

These are the traits that set us apart from AI. Are you ready to embrace your full stack human potential?

#AI #Superpowers #HumanPotential

videos.title: AI: Solving Unimaginable Problems
videos.description:
What impossible problems can we solve with AI in the next 5 years?

As AI evolves, we need to shift our mindset. Instead of fearing job loss, let’s focus on creative solutions for long-standing issues in our industry. What challenges have we overlooked that AI can help us tackle?

Let’s rethink the future together!

#AI #Innovation #Future

videos.title: Claude's AI Town Voted Yes On Everything. That's Not A Good Sign.
videos.description:
What's really happening inside those viral AI agent town experiments? The common story is that AI agents went rogue, fell in love, and burned down a virtual city. The reality is more complicated, and far more useful if you actually build with agents.

In this video, I share the inside scoop on what Emergence AI's 15-day experiment really teaches us about deploying AI agents:

 • Why long-running behavior, not single answers, is the real test
 • How five identical towns ran by different LLMs dive
